scripts.vercel-build:
bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail
CACHE_DIR="$PWD/.vercel/cache"
FLUTTER_DIR="$CACHE_DIR/flutter"
PUB_CACHE_DIR="$CACHE_DIR/pub-cache"
mkdir -p "$CACHE_DIR"

if [ ! -d "$FLUTTER_DIR/.git" ]; then
  rm -rf "$FLUTTER_DIR"
  git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git -b stable "$FLUTTER_DIR"
fi

export PATH="$FLUTTER_DIR/bin:$PATH"
export PUB_CACHE="$PUB_CACHE_DIR"

flutter --version
flutter config --no-analytics --enable-web
flutter pub get

set -o pipefail
flutter build web --release --dart-define=API_BASE_URL=${API_BASE_URL-} 2>&1 | tail -n 250
'
